_notes.ical_urls: Each entry can be a plain URL string or an object {url, category}. Category controls the event color on the calendar (1-5). Remove the placeholder entry above and add your iCal URL(s).
_notes.countdown_target: ISO 8601 date string, e.g. '2026-12-31'. Leave empty to hide countdown.
_notes.reload_interval_seconds: How often the background thread refreshes iCal data. The UI 'Reload' button triggers an immediate refresh regardless of this interval.
